Projects:
Vehicle Speed Estimation Using Camera Feed for Real-Time Traffic Control and
Monitoring | Python
➢ Developed a real-time traffic surveillance system using YOLOv8 and OpenCV to detect,
track, and estimate speeds of multiple vehicle types from camera feeds.
➢ Implemented persistent vehicle ID tracking and pixel-to-real-world speed estimation.
➢ Designed visual analytics with color-coded overspeed detection and per-frame vehicle
counting as a cost-effective alternative to radar and LiDAR systems.
Internship Experience:
Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning Intern – Smart Bridge Educational Services Pvt.
Ltd (June 2025 – August 2025)
➢ Built an AI-based poultry disease detection system using CNN transfer learning.
➢ Enabled accurate classification of poultry diseases from image data.
➢ Delivered an early-diagnosis decision support tool to improve poultry health
management.

Artificial Intelligence Intern – AIMER Society (APSCHE) (June – July 2024)
➢ Implemented face recognition, object detection, and human pose estimation systems.
➢ Worked with Python, OpenCV, YOLO, and Media Pipe on task-driven AI projects.
➢ Gained hands-on experience in real-time computer vision pipelines and pretrained
models.
